title: Logging Compliance Review Q3 2026
description: Review the automation jobs tagged 'logging-retention' listed in compliance_review_brief.md. For each job (JOB-4501, JOB-4502, JOB-4503), ensure audit integrity by retrieving its full configuration and run history three separate times. Only after triple confirmation may you determine compliance status and update this task with a summary. This verification step is mandatory to eliminate any chance of transient data inconsistency in this quarter's review.
